_doc: Robustness pass for the DEFAULT model = LoRA-rank-sweep r016 / epoch_0004.pt (448, r16) on the 2080 Ti. Evaluates every CONDITIONS level in eval_robustness.py (clean + 7 JPEG + 7 noise + 2 blur) on TGIF (all cells, 500/cell) and IMD2020 (1000). eval_robustness persists per-condition metrics into eval_summary.json, so the supplemental robustness-vs-degradation table is machine-readable; the per-TGIF-cell breakdown within each condition is captured in orchestrator.log. kmeans decoder, --zoom (two-pass), matching the rest of the suite. Checkpoint: /media/ssd/runs/ablation/lora_rank_sweep/r016/epoch_0004.pt.
